AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.enterpriseSecurityGroupId: The enterprise security group ID to authorize new security group rules for.
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules: The enterprise security group rules to be authorized.
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.portRange: Destination port range. Supports contiguous ports (e.g. "1-80") and discrete ports (e.g. "80,7000,8000", comma-separated, up to 15 values). Defaults to 1-65535 if empty.
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.sourcePortRange: Source port range. Supports contiguous ports (e.g. "1-80") and discrete ports (e.g. "80,7000,8000", comma-separated, up to 15 values). Defaults to 1-65535 if empty.
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.protocol: Protocol type: tcp, udp, or icmp.
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.sourceIp: Source IP address. Use "all" to match any address.
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.destIp: Destination IP address. Use "all" to match any address.
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.localIp: Local IP address. Use "all" to match any address.
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.createdTime: Creation time of the enterprise security group rule.
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.updatedTime: Last modification time of the enterprise security group rule.
